description: Your university rocketry team is upgrading their dual-deploy high-power rocket to a heavy Aerotech K550W motor for an altitude record attempt. Using the base design at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/cg_optimization.ork, restore flight stability by installing the Aerotech K550W motor and repositioning both the 'Main parachute' and 'Drouge parachute' at least 150mm forward toward the nose. You must not add any new mass components or modify the dimensions of fins, body tubes, or the nose cone. Verify flight performance with a simulation. Save the optimized design to /home/ga/Documents/exports/cg_optimized.ork and document the motor used, before/after stability margins, and final simulated apogee in a report at /home/ga/Documents/exports/cg_optimization_report.txt.
